overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a hooded character standing on a rocky mountain overlook during golden hour, gazing at a distant snow-capped peak with dramatic sun rays breaking through clouds. The wind gently moves the character's cloak as birds occasionally fly through the vast open sky above the valley lake below.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain cliff overlook with valley vista

events.description: flock of birds flies across the sky from left to right above the mountain peak
wind gust causes character's cloak to billow outward dramatically
second flock of birds flies through the upper frame near the clouds

agents.ego_description: hooded character stands at cliff edge, gazing at distant mountain vista with slight weight shifting and cloak responding to wind

entered.detail: large mountain peak with snow-covered summit backlit by golden sun rays breaking through clouds
stone outcrop where character stands, overlooking the valley below
calm water body visible in the valley between mountain ridges
dense green treetops covering the lower slopes below the cliff
vertical wooden marker or fence post at the edge of the overlook

segments.scene_description: The character stands motionless on a rocky mountain overlook during golden hour, facing a magnificent snow-capped peak illuminated by dramatic sunbeams. Below, a forest canopy stretches toward a serene lake in the valley. Birds occasionally fly across the vast sky as wind moves through the character's cloak, creating a contemplative, cinematic atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a contemplative moment on a rocky mountain overlook that emphasizes the vast scale of a golden hour landscape. It begins with a motionless hooded character gazing toward a magnificent snow-capped peak as dramatic sunbeams break through the clouds. As the camera lingers, the focus expands to reveal a dense forest canopy stretching down toward a serene lake nestled in the valley below. The scene then settles into a cinematic atmosphere where birds drift across the vast sky and a gentle wind stirs the fabric of the character's cloak.
